content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose(arch)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
H: low_ops ∧ short_ddl ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith) ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
P: modules(billing,core_app,auth) ∧ seams(stable_apis) ∧ split(post_release)
V: ship(<=ddl) ∧ ops_cost(low) ∧ split_ready
R: ! premature_distribution ∧ ! shared_mutable_coupling
A: default=modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ defer_split

[AUDIT]
default modular monolith on PostgreSQL. 6 devs, 4 months, part-time ops, modest traffic not justify distributed overhead. keep clean module seams (billing, core_app, auth) for post-release split. main risk premature distribution.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: block(header_override_identity)
C: public_boundary ∧ no_trust("x-user-id")
H: client_sets("x-user-id") ⇒ session_confusion ∧ horizontal_privilege_escalation
R: ! impersonation ∧ ! cross_user_read_write ∧ ! audit_log_poisoning
P: revert → userId=session.userId ∧ drop("x-user-id") @ gateway/ ∧ if(!session.userId) 401
V: test(spoof "x-user-id" ≠ session.userId ⇒ 401) ∧ test(missing session ⇒ 401) ∧ test(cross_user_access ⇒ denied) ∧ test(gateway strips client "x-user-id")
A: bind userId from session only; strip "x-user-id" at public edge

[AUDIT]
Diff breaks trust boundary. Client sets "x-user-id", overrides session.userId. Attacker impersonates any user. Fix: revert to session.userId, strip "x-user-id" at gateway, return 401 when session absent. Verify spoof denied, missing session denied, cross-user denied, gateway strip confirmed.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_retention(billing_worker_tick)
C: minimal_diff ∧ preserve(tick_cadence) ∧ no_api_change
H: setInterval_cb closes_over(batch_rows,last_result) ⇒ refs_pinned ⇒ heapUsed↑
P: audit(tick_cb) → extract(tick_body_as_named_fn) → null(batch_rows,last_result) post_process → ensure(no_outer_let_accum) → verify(heap_flat_across_ticks)
V: test(heap_stable_over_N_ticks_empty_queue) ∧ test(heap_returns_to_baseline_after_drain) ∧ test(tick_still_fires_on_cadence)
R: ! hidden_ref_via(logger_bound_ctx|metrics_timer|db_cursor_not_closed)
A: null_closed_refs_each_tick ∧ move_state_outside_cb_only_if_bounded

[AUDIT]
root_cause: setInterval callback closure retain batch_rows and last_result between ticks. even empty queue, outer bindings stay alive, heapUsed climb.
min_fix: inside tick, after processing, set batch_rows=null and last_result=null before return. if accumulator let declared outside cb, move inside or clear each tick. confirm db cursor / logger child / metrics timer all released.
reg_test: run worker N ticks with empty queue, assert heapUsed delta < threshold. run with burst then drain, assert heap

@flint v0 hybrid

G: design(audit_log_schema) ∧ support(compliance_export)
C: retention(7y) ∧ lean_ops ∧ monthly_partition ∧ store=PostgreSQL
H: native_range_partition(created_at) ∧ jsonb_payload ⇒ cheap_retention ∧ flexible_export

P:
  schema:
    audit_log(
      id          bigint_gen_identity,
      occurred_at timestamptz not null,
      actor_id    bigint not null,
      actor_type  text not null,
      action      text not null,
      target_type text not null,
      target_id   text not null,
      request_id  uuid,
      source_ip   inet,
      payload     jsonb not null,
      pk(id, occurred_at)
    )
    partition by range(occurred_at)
    child: audit_log_YYYY_MM
    index:
      btree(occurred_at)
      btree(actor_id, occurred_at)
      btree(target_type, target_id, occurred_at)
      gin(payload jsonb_path_ops)
  partitioning:
    monthly_ranges ∧ pg_partman_or_cron_precreate(+3_months)
    detach_old → archive_to_object_store(parquet) → drop
    retention_cursor = now() - 7y
  export:
    view(audit_log_export) ∧ copy_to_parquet(partition_scoped)
    partition_pruning ⇒ bounded_scan

V:
  insert(row) → lands_in(current_month_

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review(rate_limiter_key)
C: trust_boundary ∧ gateway_strips_xff_required
H: client_sets("X-Forwarded-For") ⇒ bypass_rate_limit ∨ victim_lockout
R: ! spoofed_xff ∧ ! multi_ip_xff_list ∧ ! missing_ttl ∧ ! no_expire_unbounded_keys
P: prefer(req.ip) ∧ require(gateway_normalizes_xff) ∧ parse(leftmost_trusted_hop) ∧ Δ(incr → multi(incr,expire))
V: test(spoofed_xff_denied) ∧ test(xff_list_parsed) ∧ test(absent_xff_falls_to_req_ip) ∧ test(ttl_set_on_first_incr) ∧ test(cross_ip_isolation)
A: bind_key_from_trusted_source ∧ set_ttl_atomic

[AUDIT]
Finding: key derived from client-controlled "X-Forwarded-For". Public edge must not trust it.
Exploit: attacker rotates header value, each request gets fresh bucket, limiter bypassed. Inverse: attacker pins victim IP in header, exhausts victim bucket.
Second bug: incr without expire. Keys in Redis grow unbounded, no window reset.
Mitigation: use req.ip, or parse leftmost hop only after gateway guarantees it stripped client-supplied XFF.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent_webhook_receiver
C: postgres ∧ provider_retries_5xx ∧ observable_replays
P: require("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(webhook_events, key=idempotency_key, unique) → on_conflict_return_stored_result → process_in_tx(event_id) → persist(result, status)
P: replay_log(table=webhook_replays, cols=[key, received_at, provider_id, outcome, first_seen_id])
V: dup_same_key_returns_stored_200 ∧ concurrent_same_key_one_winner ∧ missing_key_returns_"400" ∧ key_reuse_different_payload_returns_"409" ∧ 5xx_only_on_transient_infra
A:
dedup_strategy: unique(idempotency_key) in webhook_events ∧ insert_first_wins ∧ conflict→return_cached_response ∧ payload_hash_compare→mismatch⇒"409" ∧ processing_row_lock(key) for in_flight
error_model: "400" missing_key ∧ "409" key_reuse_payload_mismatch ∧ "200" replay_same_payload ∧ "5xx" only transient_db_or_downstream ∧ never_5xx_on_duplicate
short_why: provider retries demand deterministic replay; unique key + payload_hash separates safe_replay from abuse; replay_log gives observability without coupling to business table

[AUDIT]
Key in webhook_events table, unique constraint on id

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_n_plus_1(/invoices)
C: preserve_response_shape ∧ min_diff ∧ add_regression_gate
H: per_row_db_findUser ⇒ 3x_latency_regress
P: collect_customer_ids(rows) → batch_load(db.findUserMany(ids)) → index_by_id → map_rows(lookup) → preserve_shape
V: unit(shape_equiv) ∧ perf_gate(query_count ≤ 2 ∧ p95 ≤ baseline*1.2) ∧ regression_test(N_rows_triggers_1_batch)
R: ! findUserMany_missing ∨ ordering_drift ∨ null_customer
A: replace_loop_with_batch ∧ add_query_count_assertion

[AUDIT]
bug: db.findUser called per row in /invoices loop → N+1.
fix: gather customerIds, one batched load (findUserMany or IN query), map back by id, keep response shape byte-equivalent.
gate: regression test asserts ≤ 2 DB calls for N invoices, plus p95 budget.
risks: no batch API exists (add one), row order drift, null/missing customerId rows.
